billedTooltip: Cannot grant amnesty: this class has already been included in a processed invoice.
title: Grant Amnesty
description: Do you want to grant amnesty for {{studentName}} in this class? This action will cancel the cancellation invoice and is irreversible.

justification.label: Justification (optional)
justification.placeholder: E.g.: Technical issue, medical emergency, force majeure...

success.title: Amnesty Granted
success.description: The cancellation charge for {{studentName}} has been removed.

error.title: Error
error.description: Unable to grant amnesty. Please try again.
